name: canshare-tnm-yp-stage-group
title: NZ AJCC post therapy (neoadjuvant) pathological stage group
description: The post therapy or post neoadjuvant pathological stage groups that describe how far a cancer has grown and spread using information obtained from pathological examination of tissue samples, using AJCC cancer staging manual.
